reviews.text:
There are no words that can fully express the gratitude and respect I have for Nathan. Inside of just over one year he has twice been a critical component of a successful outcome. First, in January of 2023 he aided clients of mine in a double probate vested ownership issue that at least 2 other firms couldn’t resolve (months wasted) but he was able to get it fully done, roasted a rogue underwriter at a title company who thought they knew more than an attorney, and closed all title issues on time so my Sellers could close on the sale of their home and buy another home.

Then, my father passed in February of 2024 and as smart as he was he made some mistakes by omission that led to a probate issue. My mother, who is not legally or financially sophisticated, would have had a nervous breakdown if it were not for Nathan’s calming demeanor, confidence, and seemingly Nostradamus-like ability to predict how everything would pan out and the specific time periods each step in the process would take. He also dissolved a poorly structured land trust and leveraged a means to have title to my mothers home pass properly to her sons in the event of her incapacitation or death, and he created for us a durable power of attorney where either me or one of my brothers could make a judgment without any  approval of the other siblings needed; something my mother wanted.

I recommend Nathan both personally and professionally and would stake my own reputation as a professional on his ability to handle any probate proceedings you may have and to advise you in your estate planning ahead of any tragedy that may befall you to ensure that you and your family & loved ones do not have to endure the uncertainty of probate. Have him prepare your will & trust today. His rates are reasonable and well worth the peace of mind!  Don’t let this type of thing wait. Had it not been for my first experience with him, my Dad would have had nothing in place. It wasn’t until I told the story that my mother busted his cops to make arrangements for when his time would come, unfortunately sooner than anyone could foresee.

reviews.text: keep looking, you can get much better representation and not have to risk a terrible outcome like ours. Juan 'handled' my wife's traffic citation. Juan's communication was terrible. I had to call multiple times to setup the arrangement, which I didn't mind. when the court date was only a few days away and I had not heard anything, I called him back to which he acknowledged the date and blamed the court for changing it. He would have just not appeared had I not done this, I figured once he was taking the case he would have notified the court. The date was then moved by Juan, but he didn't notify us. Then, Juan testified no contest and got us heavy court costs on top of the full citation amount, and mandatory driving courses. Why did I even have an attorney? The real kicker here is that he didn't even call us to inform us, four days after the hearing we went onto the court website and learned this, then I CALLED HIM. I'd give 0 stars here if I could, completely terrible experience. He wasn't even going to tell me he pleaded no contest, I had to bring it up. I had a bad feeling when I first called, I wish I had acted on it and gone somewhere else. I hope you do so.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the feedback. The circumstances of this case were such that getting a withhold of adjudication in this matter as I did (a withhold of adjudication means the driver received no points) was far better than I expected given the sentencing tendencies of the judges in this county for drivers going in excess of 100 mph. The citing officer had all of his paperwork in order for the hearing, completed the required pre and post shift check, had all necessary certifications and calibrations and an independent recollection of the events. Given all of this, there was no path to getting the case dismissed. I requested that the officer recommend to the court that no points be given for the offense in exchange for a no contest plea. The court was hesitant to do so given the high rate of speed and previous traffic history, but ultimately was willing to keep the points off the license but ordered the driver to traffic school and ordered a $400 fine (the maximum fine could have been up to $500). I wish that there was more that could have been done, of course. It's always easier to give someone great news as opposed to less than great news. It's true that this is going to cost you a little bit of money and a little bit of time, but it could have also cost you some points on your license and so what I could do, I did. Thank you again for taking the time to leave a review and for the feedback. Wish you well.

reviews.text: I had a very time sensitive case. I had a difficult time finding counsel and I was at my wits end as the deadline was approaching. I had been told I had no chance at an appeal. A chance to talk to someone about my case and for some guidance. I couldn't afford to hire her so I wanted to know how to get started. Ms. Cary and her team gave me their undivided attention and time. I left her office more confident that I could do the appeal. A friend later helped me cover additional legal costs and I was able to go back to Ms. Cary for a revision of my document. Again she gave me her undivided attention and time. I submitted my appeal on time and I feel so much better than I have in a long time. It's been a hectic month and I've cried everyday. Today, I can cry happy tears. I don't know how USCIS will receive it but Ms. Cary gave me a chance that others didn't. Thank you!

I did not have any advanced directives, trusts, or wills set up and was very concerned about the what ifs. I called Mike for some advice and we jumped right in. He ensured I had everything covered, even things I had forgotten about or did not know needed to be accounted for, and executed prior to my surgery so that I could rest easy on that front. From the very beginning, Emily Calvin has been nothing short of incredible. She has stood by me through a long and difficult case that has spanned years, showing unwavering dedication, compassion, and professionalism every step of the way. Her empathy and genuine care made all the difference during some of the most stressful times of my life.

What sets her apart is not only her kindness but her brilliance. She is an absolute wizard when it comes to case law. She is thorough, strategic, and always prepared. She fought for me as if my case were her own, going far beyond what most would consider “the extra mile.”

Because of her hard work and steadfast support, I always felt confident and cared for, even when things were uncertain. I cannot express enough gratitude for all she has done. If you are looking for an attorney who is both exceptionally skilled and truly compassionate, look no further. She’s the real deal, and I am endlessly thankful for her.

I had the privilege of working with Emily Calvin on my custody/divorce case, and I cannot recommend them highly enough. From the very beginning, she took the time to truly understand my situation, explain my options clearly, and make sure I felt informed every step of the way.

What stood out most was her responsiveness and compassion — every question I had was answered promptly, and I always felt like my concerns were taken seriously. Court processes can feel overwhelming, but Emily was steady, prepared, and professional throughout.

Because of Emily’s hard work and dedication, I felt supported during a very difficult time and confident in the outcome of my case. I am grateful to have had such a knowledgeable and caring attorney on my side, and I would recommend her to anyone in need.

reviews.text:
My family has been using The Toney Law Firm for my grandfather’s probate for a while now, and it’s been a rollercoaster. I don’t have any say in who we hire since I’m not the family member who actually contracted with them, but if it were up to me, we would’ve switched firms a long time ago.

When we first started, we had a great paralegal—super helpful, friendly, and knew exactly what she was doing. Then she left (we were told it was because of a bad experience with the office.) The office manager (Mr. Toney's wife) stepped in after that, and honestly, it was awful.Our experience went downhill quickly. She was short, rude, and talked to us like we were a problem,  it was horrible.

After that, a new attorney took over and he was great—really easy to work with and his law clerk was just as good. But not long after, he left too. The law clerk (who became an attorney) kept working on it with a new paralegal, and those two were amazing. They got things moving again and made the process so much easier to deal with. Sadly, about a year ago, that paralegal quit too, and things slowed down again. The attorney still did a great job, but  things were obviously slower. Now she’s left too, and we’re once again stuck with no real point of contact. Anytime we call, the staff—especially the same rude office manager—either doesn’t know what’s going on or just isn’t helpful.

It’s clear this place can’t seem to keep their good employees, and after dealing with the office manager, I can see why The good people leave. If we weren’t so close to finishing, I’d be pushing hard to move the case somewhere else. If you want stability and respectful communication, I wouldn’t recommend The Toney Law Firm.

Also want to add that I understand probates take a long time to complete and my issue is in NO WAY with how long the process is taking - it is the instability of service as explained above.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hello Ms. Sharon-Lee - As you may be aware, finding good employees can be one of the most difficult tasks facing a small business. If you would like to speak with the attorney on your case, please give us a call and you will receive an appointment for a phone conference. After the associate attorney left, we have been trying to contact all clients to provide updates. The attorney handling the case now would be happy to speak with you, or the estate representative if that is not you, to provide a plan for progress or the status of the case. We appreciate your help and patience while we are working through this issue.

reviews.text:
Terrible Experience – Do Not Trust This Firm

I had a phone consultation with Mr. Tony in early October and at the end of the appointment I paid in full for him to review some documents and prepare a deed for me. However, the service I received following my phone consultation was appalling and unprofessional. After a few weeks with no communication, I left multiple messages, but no one returned my calls.

In November, I spoke to a woman who told me she would look into it and get back to me, but once again, I was ignored. By December, nearly two months after my consultation, I spoke with the office manager, who was incredibly rude & condescending. She claimed there was no record of my appointment and even accused me of lying about paying for the services, despite me having proof on my bank statement.

At this point, I have received absolutely nothing from this office, no service, and no refund. It's now been nearly three months, and I've still heard nothing. I've left another voicemail, but once again, no one has returned my call. This office is completely unprofessional, shady, and disrespectful. I’ve never been treated so poorly, and I strongly advise against doing business with them.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello Ms. Wallen - We have reviewed our records and cannot find a phone conference, questionnaire, documents or any record of payment under your name. Has your name changed or did you contact us on behalf of someone else? In any event, if you did make a payment, please call us at 352-376-6800 and arrange to send us your proof that you made a payment to our office and we will promptly issue you a refund if you did not receive the services promised.

However, we do take issue with your assertions that our firm is in any way "completely unprofessional, shady, and disrespectful". In our over 20 years of helping thousands of clients and their families in Florida, we have built a firm that strives to provide clients with the utmost respect and competent representation. So, any assertions otherwise are flatly rejected.

reviews.text:
I am going to be as kind as possible. I don’t want to write this, but I must. If i don’t post this, someone else may endure the same experience. The Toney Law Firm appeared unable to manage my husband’s probate while protecting my assets (large property, 2 homes). My husband died unexpectedly. My daughter urged me to contract with Mr. Toney’s firm (for probate) because “daddy’s friend” recommended him. I paid upfront fees (required), knowing that a fellow Gator would take care of me “in all kinds of weather.” I must say, though, that nothing about my experience with the firm represented “compassionate legal services for elders;” it was profoundly upsetting and challenging. I am paraphrasing all remarks.

At our initial meeting (after I was required to pay fees), I was seriously injured (not my fault), disabled, and in significant pain…vulnerable. Mr. Toney advised I was only entitled to 1/2 of my property (wedding gift of bare land in 1983), appearing confident that his plan for managing the probate was lawful and that other attorneys would agree. It appeared nearly 4 decades of marriage didn’t matter; there was no Will. I had invested in the property over many years. I was provided a “flow chart” and advised “there’s nothing you can do.” Mr. Toney said “Getting another opinion will only waste time and money.” I left feeling hopeless and helpless.

I followed all instructions while researching Fla. statutes related to marital assets. I was in tremendous distress. I had no intention of interfering with the Courts but I politely emailed to ask if Florida had any statutes allowing Mr. Toney to request faster progress, as I was disabled, facing 3 surgeries. The response was most unkind, in all CAPITAL letters. I advised the firm regarding my research of state statutes, explaining my investment of money and time, over many years, yet I felt disregarded. I recall being “reminded” that expressing concerns and asking questions (to excess) could result in client termination (with a loss of all funds paid). The Courts were blamed for lack of progress.

In sheer desperation, I requested a face-to-face meeting with Mr. Toney, but neither he (nor his associates) were available. The office administrator advised that Mr. Toney was out of the country (another staff member said he was in the office. I was offered a 15-minute phone conference 3 wks. from the date of my request. After SEVEN months of tears, anxiety, lost sleep, and emotional pain, it appeared Mr. Toney’s plan was going forward, regardless of my concerns. I then consulted with another attorney who explained I could hire her; she would ask the Courts to terminate Mr. Toney’s firm from the probate. While still under contract with Scott Toney, I sold my property. At closing, I asked (witness present), “Mr. Toney, are you absolutely sure there are no state statutes/legal processes that will allow me to retain more than 1/2 the value of my property?” Scott Toney shook his head, saying, “No. You should have come to me before your husband passed away.”

Soon, the Courts terminated my contract with the Toney Law Firm. The Courts weren’t “slow,” after all; each new Court Order (written by the new attorney) was signed within 72 hrs. The Courts granted me the TOTAL value of my property! A subsequent Court Order required Mr. Toney to forward all funds to my attorney. I lost a substantial sum of money to the Toney Law Firm. I paid the new attorney to complete the probate and to develop a new set of “End of Life” documents, for me (I was advised the documents prepared by the Toney Law Firm contained multiple errors.) I would say one of the worst aspects of this experience is I can no longer trust licensed professionals, even a fellow Gator. In fact, I can’t trust anyone, ever again. This review was reviewed by legal counsel before I made the decision to post it. I have been assured that my words are accurate. I have no doubt that the firm is quite capable of completing other legal tasks but I cannot recommend you contract with the Toney Law Firm to manage your probate.
reviews.ownerResponse: Pursuant to the Florida Bar ethics rules and opinions, the attorney is not permitted to respond as he would wish, but the review by this person is neither fair nor accurate.

Steven G. Frisco, Esq.

reviews.text:
From the moment we first contacted Steve Frisco, we knew we were in the right hands. After reaching out to several other attorneys, many of whom didn’t answer, didn’t return calls, or had full voicemails, it was clear that Mr. Frisco stood apart. He responded to our calls and texts at all hours, even on weekends, with a level of kindness, professionalism, and responsiveness that immediately put us at ease.
We had never dealt with any legal issues before and were completely lost. He patiently guided us through every step of the process, explaining things clearly and making sure we understood our options. His knowledge and dedication helped us make the confident decision to retain him and thank goodness we did.

He fought hard for my husband, who was facing serious legal trouble, and ultimately secured the best possible outcome for his case. We are beyond grateful for his tireless work and unwavering support. While we hope to never need legal help again, we will always consider him a friend and would recommend him without hesitation to anyone in need of a truly exceptional attorney.

I must say that Steven Frisco was a breath of fresh air. Mr. Frisco has a very likeable personality and he made me very comfortable considering my circumstances.  Mr. Frisco was very thorough and explained my options assuring I understood. I highly recommend Steven Frisco of Rush and Frisco.

Kelly Klaassen
Steve made sure my fiancé stayed out of prison and got the help he needs!! Forever grateful to this law firm!

I would like to highly recommend Attorney Steven Frisco. He went above and beyond the call of duty to assist me with a sensitive matter involving an extended family member who is a minor and had found himself in some difficulty.

From the very beginning, Mr. Frisco demonstrated not only deep legal knowledge but also genuine kindness and compassion. His communication was outstanding—clear, timely, and reassuring at every step of the process. What truly sets him apart is his stellar reputation and strong relationships within the courts and the community, which proved invaluable in helping us reach a positive resolution.

Mr. Frisco’s honesty, fairness, and professionalism were evident throughout, and I am deeply grateful for the way he handled this situation. Without hesitation, I recommend him to anyone in need of a dedicated, trustworthy, and highly effective attorney.

DWB
With the help and advice of the wonderful professionals at Rush & Frisco, our family continues to thrive and move forward.  We will be forever grateful.

Steven was and continues to be a great lawyer who looks out in the best interest for his clients ! Always was there to answer any questions or concerns and helped get the case dropped ! Thanks for all the good work and an amazing lawyer !

My son was facing at least ten they got it done to 4yrs. I really was surprised by what they offered him and he wasn’t out a year from serving 3 God is good all the time. There not cheap but they get the job done so look them up thanks again.
Steven is great. Very professional, experienced in his practice, and straight forward. No matter the situation, his law firm will always be my go to. Thank you sir and team @ Rush & Frisco Law

I had the pleasure of speaking with Steve Frisco, and it was an incredibly helpful experience. From the moment our conversation began, he made me feel welcomed and at ease. Steve’s extensive legal knowledge and years of experience were immediately evident—he explained everything clearly and thoughtfully, making a complex situation much easier to understand. He is not only highly professional but also genuinely friendly and approachable. I left our meeting feeling confident and supported. I will absolutely be going to him for any future legal assistance and would highly recommend him to anyone in need of legal guidance.

I cannot recommend Attorney Steven G. Frisco highly enough. When my family and I faced a terrifying attack at our home and I was subsequently charged with Aggravated Assault with a Deadly Weapon and Burglary of a Conveyance – charges that stemmed from me defending my husband and myself – I felt utterly helpless and betrayed by the system. From our very first conversation, Mr. Frisco was a beacon of hope and a relentless advocate.

What immediately set him apart was his unwavering belief in my innocence. In a situation where law enforcement had twisted the narrative and made me the suspect, Mr. Frisco listened, understood, and never doubted my account. His strategic approach, focusing on self-defense and defense of another, was incredibly effective. As a former prosecutor, he possessed invaluable insight into how the state would approach the case, which was a tremendous advantage.

His communication was exemplary. He was consistently responsive, even communicating via text, which made a stressful situation much more manageable. He provided crucial emotional support throughout the ordeal, guiding us without offering false hopes, which I truly appreciated.

Mr. Frisco was instrumental in shifting the entire narrative. Through a direct meeting with the prosecutor, he masterfully highlighted that the 'victims' were, in fact, the aggressors who came to our home armed. Thanks to his diligence and persuasive arguments, the prosecutor's office closed the case before discovery was even released or state charges were officially filed, concluding that there wasn't enough evidence to proceed.
Beyond his legal prowess, Mr. Frisco handled the immense emotional toll this situation took on my family with remarkable grace and patience. He navigated our stress-induced difficulties with understanding and compassion, and genuinely celebrated with us when we received the news that the case was closed. He was truly amazing.

If you are looking for a criminal defense attorney who is not only exceptionally skilled and strategic but also genuinely cares about his clients and will fight tirelessly for justice, look no further than Attorney Steven G. Frisco.
Steve handled our case wonderfully and expeditiously.  Thank you Steve
Thank you so much for helping my brother when he needed it the most. I highly recommend you to anyone 🙏
Mr Frisco is attentive, intelligent, and driven.   He's what I always expected a good attorney to be. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for all of your help Steve.  5 stars all the way.

Our family is forever grateful for the hard work Steve Frisco put into my daughter’s case. He overcame obstacles that seemed impossible to the very last minute. Worked over holiday breaks, late nights, and early mornings. He even pulled off snapping this mama out of full panic mode a few times. “Would a surgeon allow you to assist during a procedure on your loved one? This is what I do, trust the process.” Touche’ Mr. Frisco.

Mr. Steven was very supportive throughout my journey. He was able to work with me financially and overall keep me sane during this process. Mr. Rush was great as well keeping things clear and understandable. I would use this company if you want attorneys that care for you.
Excellent, Lawyer, Explained to detail. would Highly recommend.
Rush and Frisco did an excellent job of explaining the situation. They were on top of everything that was occurring. Highly recommended!! Thank you both!!
I highly recommend Rush and Frisco Law.Steven Frisco did a fantastic  job and hats off to his secretary Ms Tammy. Sincerely, Dewitt Eugene Stewart!

I couldn't be more pleased with how Steven Frisco helped me navigate and handle situation. He was very responsive and communicative, walked me through the whole process and handled everything, and in the end I got the best outcome possible.

Mr Frisco is amazing !! He literally performed a miracle!! Our family will forever be grateful for him 🙏
Their the best  Lawyer team  around.  Ready to fight for you!!

Steve at Rush and Frisco Law was beyond a miracle for me.  After my third DUI, within ten years, I should have been facing a  very bleak outcome. If you ever need any legal representation I can’t stress the invaluable experience and expertise Steve at Rush and Frisco Law brings. My family and I are forever indebted to him.

Such an amazing lawyer, helped me and my mother in two separate cases. Steve Frisco has the knowledge, tools and connections to get the job down quit and easy. I would go back to Frisco for anything, he’s affordable and will be there for you the whole time.
Fast, attentive, and straight to the point. Steve is awesome and I highly recommend. Came in short notice everyone took the time to stop and treat us like family. Couldn’t have asked for more!!

Highly recommend them! Mr. Frisco was very helpful and straightforward about everything and kept me up to date and made sure everything was explained clearly. He and they will def go out of their way to do anything they can!
Attorney Frisco was extremely helpful and gave great advice. Highly recommend him.

Mr. Frisco was incredibly helpful and professional in resolving my civil traffic crash ticket! I was issued a citation after being involved in a crash that wasn't my fault and at a hearing Mr. Frisco convinced the judge to dismiss the citation completely and waive all fines. I highly recommend Mr. Frisco at Rush & Frisco Law to anyone seeking an extremely skilled attorney. He was professional, knowledgeable, confident, friendly, communicative, and he was able to fully resolve my case which made it so I didn't get any points on my license and my insurance didn't go up!

***UPDATE: Because my first experience was so phenomenal, I came back recently to have a similar issue resolved. The entire hearing only took about ten minutes via zoom and Mr. Frisco was able to get my citation dropped within minutes of my case being called. My previous citation (from my original review) isn't even listed on my driving record, and this one won't be either. Thank you Rush & Frisco Law for all your hard work and dedication!

reviews.text:
I cannot thank Mr. Logan Doll and his paralegal, Michelle Haddock, enough for everything they did for my husband and our family. From the very beginning, they treated us with compassion, professionalism, and determination. This was one of the most terrifying experiences of our lives, and they never stopped fighting for the truth.

Mr. Doll worked tirelessly on my husband’s case and truly believed in his innocence. Michelle was always there to answer questions, keep us informed, and offer reassurance during such an overwhelming time. Their dedication, attention to detail, and commitment to justice ultimately led to the charges being dropped and my husband being released.

Because of their hard work and belief in doing what is right, my husband was saved from facing something that could have changed our lives forever. We will always be grateful for the way they stood by us and fought for justice.

If you are looking for a legal team that truly cares about their clients and will work relentlessly on your behalf, I highly recommend Mr. Logan Doll and Michelle Haddock. They are not only excellent at what they do, but they are also genuinely good people.

Thank you both from the bottom of our hearts.

Michelle from the Law Offices of Edwin and Jones is truly exceptional. She went above and beyond to help our son and generously gave her time not only to him, but also to my husband and me. Every question we had was answered with patience and care, and she made us feel confident and reassured throughout the entire process. It’s rare to find someone so genuinely dedicated to helping people. Michelle feels like a family member to us, and we are truly blessed to have come in contact with her.❤️

One of my family members used Chris Jones & won at trial. So when I found myself in need of an attorney, he was my FIRST CALL! They are THE BEST. Not only did they take my call in the middle of the night, they make things happen in a timely manner. I can’t thank Chris & Michelle both for their time and attentiveness. The communication is everything, they keep you in the loop. You don’t have to hunt them down or blow their phone up! They go above and beyond for their clients! I couldn’t be happier, worth every penny. If you need an attorney & you want RESULTS. Look no further. I can never thank them enough for all they’ve done for my family as a whole. BEST IN THE BUSINESS. No doubt.

Mr. Logan Doll is an exceptional lawyer and a true professional. His expertise and advice helped me to solve a 20 year old problem in a matter of days. This is a person that can be trusted and his knowledge of the system is extraordinary. If you want a lawyer you can trust, Logan Doll is the person!

I cannot speak highly enough of Edwards & Jones Attorneys -especially Michelle Haddock and Chris Jones, the lead attorney on the case. From the moment we reached out, Michelle was compassionate, responsive, and incredibly reassuring. Chris demonstrated exceptional skill, professionalism, and dedication, working tirelessly to secure a resolution within just six days of the arrest.

My family is deeply grateful for their hard work and commitment. They treated us with respect, kept us informed every step of the way, and achieved an outcome we didn’t think would be possible so quickly.

If you ever find yourself in legal trouble, don’t wait—call Michelle and Chris immediately. They are the team you want on your side. Highly recommended!

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️  Highly Recommend
I couldn’t be more grateful for the help I received from Attorney Chris Jones. I was facing a misdemeanor charge, and from day one he was straightforward, responsive, and precise about what needed to be done. He advised me to complete an ADI course and explained how that would position me more favorably in court. After I finished the course, he followed through exactly as promised.  He reached out to the opposition directly, and by the time of the arraignment the charge was dropped entirely with Mr. Jones even unexpectedly showing up as I was in the courtroom which eased my nerves greatly.
What stood out most was his professionalism and strategy. He didn’t waste time, he kept me informed at every step, and he knew exactly how to handle the situation. Having someone who truly understands the process and advocates for you the right way made all the difference. If you’re in need of legal representation and want someone who is honest, proactive, and effective, I highly recommend Attorney Chris Jones. He helped me protect my record and my peace of mind, and I’m truly thankful for his work.

I can’t overstate my deep gratitude for Edwards and Jones. My brother, who was incredibly vulnerable due to his condition, felt lost and paranoid. Where other offices saw a complicated, draining case, this firm saw a person who needed fierce, human advocacy. Christopher Jones and Michelle Haddock were incredibly patient, communicating in clear, non-judgmental language and taking the time to explain the legal implications in easily digestible terms for my brother. They worked with his mental health professionals, not against them, to ensure the court understood his needs and not the distorted picture painted by his husband, attorney-in-fact with POA.  Their compassionate approach to his mental illness, combined with their vast knowledge says it all. Now our brother is getting the medical help he deserves and is not being treated as a criminal. They were a blessing when his life was falling apart.

I would like to thank Chris Jones, attorney and Michelle Haddock, legal assistant in their recent representation of a legal action. They both went above and beyond in assisting us. Their professionalism and perseverance paid off after many months of continuances and obstacles. Now, the defendant is getting the help he needs to become himself again. I can never thank them enough for being with us during this time of need. Many tears were shed, many hours of sleep were lost by family. But, these two never gave up. If I could rate them higher, I certainly would!!  I hope this review is seen by many and you will contact them for your legal needs, they are here to help you, that you can count on!!

I can’t say enough good things about Edward & Jones Law!
They did an incredible job not once, but twice, helping me through challenging legal situations with professionalism, skill, and care. Both times, they went above and beyond—always keeping me informed, explaining everything clearly, and fighting hard to achieve the best possible outcome. Their dedication and expertise truly made a difference. I’m so grateful for their hard work and highly recommend Christopher Jones to anyone in need of a trustworthy and effective attorney!

Michelle you’re the best!! She gave me her complete uninterrupted attention. Michelle went above and beyond with her professionalism, expertise and compassion. If you ever need  legal advice, do yourself a favor and call Michelle. You will thank me later!!!

He was extremely knowledgeable and always took the time to explain things. I know I was very stressed and emotional and Mr. Edwards was there to fully explain things and make sure I felt comfortable with the decisions being discussed. My situation required increased time and patience and I received that from these individuals. I pray I will never need another lawyer, however, if I ever did I can say I would 100% know who to call!! Thank you to every person in that office for all that was done to assist me through an absolutely devastating time in my life.

I could not speak any better of this law firm. My case was assigned to Chris Jones, with Logan Doll as second chair. From to start to finish, these gentleman were so very comforting. I do not regret any dollar paid, they did their job as if they were fighting for themselves.

My case was an interesting one against the state. Mr. Jones was on top of every detail from the beginning; he would even take the time to call my witnesses. Prior to trial a meeting was set up because Mr. Jones knew I had never been to court and wanted to prep me to his best ability.

In the court room, Mr. Jones and Mr. Doll were unreal. They kept me calm and explained everything going on to the best of their ability. Mr. Jones fought in that court room as if he was fighting for himself. He even had the jury loving him. Once my trial was won, I was congratulated by Mr. Jones, Mr. Edwards, and Mr. Doll. Just an all around great team that stands by you, makes you laugh through the hard times, and fights for you and what is right. I could not recommend them more!

They work hard. Mr. Doll, Esq. Is a good man, I trust him and his team.

UPDATED.

The above review was done just a few days before my trial. I wanted to make sure I'd get the chance to post a review that reflected my positive experience with this Law firm. The problem, at the time, was that my stress level was through the roof as this trial had the potential of life in prison for me. Being over 60, you don't need much of a sentence to realize this could be the rest of my life.

Now that the trail is over I have so much more I want to share about this firm:

Immediately after being arrested, Logan Doll got involved and after 23 days of waiting for my bond hearing, he was able to negotiate a reduced bail with house arrest pending trial.

False charges can be devastating and complicated. You cannot prove a negative but this team at Edwards & Jones took the time and consideration to plow through, absorb, and become familiar with the people, personalities, and evidence for a full year. Including issuing subpoenas for depositions and speaking with every single person involved. Mr. Logan and his paralegals sifted through every photo, and scrap of paper we gave them, and gave sincere attention and consideration to our commentary and firsthand insite responses to deposition transcripts that we reviewed. Sometimes when you are deep in the middle of something like this, it's hard to make sense of anything. Logan, however, was able to pull together everything from us and the prosecution, and by trial I'd say they knew more about our lives and family than we did.

At trial, Chris Jones took second chair and I felt that they were on top of things. Their confidence did a lot to keep my stress manageable. The way that they conducted themselves in direct and cross examination was professional, and kind, and intense where needed. The second day of trial Tom Edwards also attended and I felt honored to have the whole team by my side.

They didn't “get me off", they fought hard; challenging the lies and bringing out truths, giving the court and jury what they needed to bring a full acquittal.

Kind and compassionate, wise and strategic. In the end my highest praise is to consider them friends.

I want to thank Mr. LOGAN P. DOLL for not giving up on me, you are the best lawyer that I’ve ever worked with you never give up on me and because of you I have my life back because of you. I am back on my feet because of you. I have a great job you stay by my side I want to think every single one of you guys from (Edward and Jones law office) and I want to take Ms. Michelle you guys are the best and I will never forget about you guys for making sure that I have my life back. Thank you thank you 🙏🏾🙏🏾🙏🏾
Whoever answered the phone when I was asking what I believed to be a simple question was extremely rude, condescending and sarcastic with me and did not help me at all. Waste of time.

Edwards and Jones came to assist me at what was sincerely the darkest time of my life. Dealing with any charge is a horrible experience but dealing with a false accusation is a different kind of mental torment. I wouldn't wish that even on my worse enemy. It was draining and caused irreparable damage in my life. Down to the wire though, they found a way to help me avoid being taken away from my new family. Working with Mr. Jones and Michelle was amazing; words cannot express how grateful I am to them. I wish them nothing but the best in life and recommend them to the fullest to anyone else who may be in need.

The firm has the A team. Worked with Michelle directly, very responsive , reasonable rates, and they stay on top of everything. I had a few questions and they went above and beyond to address my concerns. It's a hard to find good firms like this at a reasonable rate that will treat you right. They also seem to have good relationships with the local court. They have all 5 stars here for a reason, highly recommended.

I want to start by saying — THANK YOU GOD! Without you I wouldn’t know which route to go to even start a new LIFE , a new future for me and my daughter . Secondly yet lastly, I want to thank Michelle omg Michelle! She was the greatest gift god has sent to me and my daughter. She was there every step of the way! I couldn’t have done it without you! She was loving, caring, encouraging the whole way through and just heartfelt. If you’re looking for somewhere to go in regards to a criminal case THIS IS THE BEST PLACE TO BE!!! Love you forever Michelle! Never forget me like I won’t forget you . Take care 😘
Trying to talk to someone about my case then said I don't have time for u -10 that is just sick there are no help for anyone less u got lots of money

Exceptional Results and Outstanding Service – Highly Recommended!

I cannot express enough gratitude and appreciation for the exceptional service provided by criminal law attorney Logan Doll and his exceptional paralegal, Branden. With their unparalleled expertise and dedication, they successfully fought and achieved an incredibly favorable outcome in my husband's case, reducing a mandatory 15-year minimum sentence to just 3 years. This outcome will allow my husband to be home much sooner than expected, reuniting our family and giving us a chance to rebuild our lives.

Logan Doll is an extraordinary attorney who truly cares about his clients' well-being. From the beginning of our legal journey, he confidently and methodically guided us through every step of the process. His extensive knowledge of criminal law, coupled with his persuasive arguments, played a critical role in achieving such a remarkable result.

I would also like to extend my sincerest appreciation to Branden, the amazing paralegal. Branden's commitment, attention to detail, and exceptional multitasking skills were remarkable. He was consistently responsive to our queries and concerns, shedding light on every aspect of the legal process.

I wholeheartedly endorse Logan Doll and his entire team at The Law Offices of Edwards & Jones for anyone in need of a criminal defense attorney. His outstanding legal skills, genuine concern for his clients, and the exceptional service provided by Branden make them an unbeatable combination. Choosing Attorney Doll and his team was the best decision we made, and I am eternally grateful for their hard work, dedication, and support.

Do not hesitate to trust Logan Doll's expertise and commitment to achieving exceptional results.
Edwards & Jones have been wonderful to work with on many levels.  They are caring, responsive, professional, and effective.  I highly recommend them.

Case dismissed by state of Florida, charged with a felony due to some BS statements by less than reputable neighbors. My cameras spoke otherwise when I shared footage with Edwards and Jones. It would have destroyed my career and my retirement. Thanks  Edwards and Jones!
Thomas Edwards was extremely professional and I would certainly recommend this firm to anyone needing legal representation.

Thank you so much to Michelle and the rest of the team for helping me through a difficult time with a juvenile case. The best possible outcome occurred and I will forever be indebted to her and the law office.

First and foremost, the reason I even gave this office two stars was because of Paralegal Michelle.  She was upfront, kept an open line of communication with myself as well my husband from start to finish.  We sought out Logan to represent my husband on his case and let's just say that decision was a huge mistake.  Needless to say, my husband was convicted on a charge that could've been brought down to a lesser charge had Logan argued the way that he should've.  When you hire someone to represent you, the main focus should be to ensure that your client walks away with a postive outcome or even if the outcome isn't what one was expecting, making your client feel as if you worked diligently for one.  Sadly, we walked away feeling robbed for time and money. Each case is different for sure, but the fact that Logan didn't even put up a fight against the prosecutor during this entire case is still mind blowing to say the least.. We were told to present character letters to him so when he sat down to speak with the prosecutor, they would be provided to them; those were NEVER considered NOR did he bring them to the judge's attention during the final hearing.  We both knew that my husband would've had to pay his debt back to society someway, but not with the time they gave him.  Not one time did he mention the fact that we have a family member who has health issues, which was the reason we requested that my husband isn't sent too far outside of the region.  If you're looking for someone who's experienced, and one who isn't timid in the courtroom, save your self time, agony and money; do NOT seek representation from Logan.  You'd have better luck with one of the other attorney's.
Our daughter found herself in Trouble in Gainesville and Mr Edwards took care of everything. He had the whole case dropped within a weeks time

Thomas L. Edwards and his excellent team Michelle D. Haddock, Senior Paralega and Branden R. Watson are some of the most professional and well posed firm I've encountered. They work hard in situations where other may just give up will definitely recommend to any person in anybody in legal troubles I hope to never be in a situation where i was in trouble again but if I was my 1st call will definitely be attorney office of edwards and jones

If you suddenly find you need a lawyer in the middle of the night, this is the firm to call! Sr. Paralegal, Michelle, was fabulous talking us through the process with her calming voice and getting a lawyer to call us back within a few minutes. Mr. Jones became our lawyer and was so helpful, thorough, and professional. Best yet, he got the case dropped! We are forever grateful!

So thankful for Chris Jones and staff (Michelle so helpful in any way ) representing my husband in court on 2 felony charges we were looking at several Years in prison and Chris was able to see to it that didn’t happen !! Thank you again Chris !!

When you hire someone all you want  them to do is get the job done. Mr Jones and his team did exactly that. 3 original charges, Mr Jones immediately had two of the charges tossed. The remaining felony charge required prison time if convicted. Mr jones and his team continually went the extra mile which ultimately rendered us a NOT GUIlTY verdict at trial. We fought the charge for TWO years. In those two years i learned beyond the fact that they are amazing attorneys and experts at what they do, they are genuinely passionate and obsessed about their craft. In court you are fighting for your life and this is the TEAM you want in your corner fighting for you!! Also, shout out to Michelle!

This law office is the best in town Chris Jones and Michelle are awesome and always keeps you informed of the situation very polite and professional highly recommended thank you for all you have helped me with I wish y'all nothing but the best life can offer.

Truly the best defense attorneys in Gainesville. This was my first time dealing with any criminal charges. Mr. Jones and his team kept me informed and guided me through the whole process. Because of there diligent work, they won my case. Thank you so much.

Mr. Jones and Michelle, So thankful for everything!! Very caring, professional, very efficient. Thank you for keeping us informed and being honest making us fell like family before, during, and after the case.

I just spoke to this law office on the phone and the man I was speaking with never identified himself and even greeted me.  After explaining our situation he hung up on me.  I would never do business with an attorney's office that would be so rude.  I was not being rude to this many in any way.  He was actually being rude to me and very judgemental.  This was a horrible experience.

I had a very good friend that was on trial this week and Chris Jones was his attorney. My son is an attorney and a graduate from UF as well. Chris technically, masterfully, and just like a skilled surgeon removed all of the State Attorney's alleged allegations and won the case for my friend. Chris is a grand chess master when it comes to the law. I recommend him with the highest ability I can. Excellent job! Thank you for saving my friend!!
Courtesy and caring

If I could give them 10 stars I would, Chris literally saved my life and I will be forever grateful. Chris and Michelle were both wonderful, they made everything extremely simple and helped me through a difficult time. I know they will be able to help you too

These are the people to go too !
You will not find a better team than Mr. Jones and Michelle. They truly are life saver and I will definitely be keeping them around because I have never met a more professional and excellent team than these guys right here !!!

Mr Goldberg was very down to earth & talks to you like he's known you for years.  He's very straight forward and honest.  I haven't ever said that about ANY attorney..ever.

Awesome thanks for helping me ssd in 2011 and in 2025
Informative

reviews.text:
I have received wonderful treatment and professional advice from Goldberg Law Office. I cannot recommend them high enough and wouldn't hesitate to send anyone there.
Yvonne R. Woodson, RN, AP

I’ve used Mike in my cases and I must  say I was extremely satisfied with the outcome of the case!! Both cases to be exact (1st case 2017-second case 2019) Definitely a better outcome than i expected !!! There was even a small situation that was in one of the cases I didn’t hire him for , I told him about it , and that was after he already got the case brought down to a misdemeanor from a felony,  which that case ended up being dismissed,  I don’t know how they snuck that  ticket in there or how I missed it , but I told him I’d hire him for that situation too,  he tells me he would call me back in a few , and I’m thinking by a few , he meant a few days , literally 20 minutes later he calls back and tells me that situation is Also taken care of , so then I ask what was the amount his reply was “ Don’t worry about it, Have yourself a good Christmas take care”  There’s no lawyer I’d use other than Mike Barbarette !! Thank you 🙏

As a paralegal, I’m meticulous when it comes to researching legal professionals—and I couldn't be happier with the attorney I found to handle my mother-in-law’s tickets that she received as a result of an accident while she was visiting from out of state. From the start, Kevin's professionalism, responsiveness, honestly and clear communication stood out. He navigated the process efficiently and ultimately got the case dismissed—a best-case outcome.

Kevin delivered results that exceeded our expectations. Highly recommend him to anyone looking for skilled and reliable representation. Thanks again Kevin!

Mr. Barbarette showed remarkable integrity, providing straightforward guidance on available choices and potential pitfalls, supporting me through an extremely challenging circumstance while in HTO status. It was certainly worth the investment, and I am truly appreciative of his time and effort, as well as the outstanding results we received. This law firm is undoubtedly worth every dollar spent. 11/20/2024 ✝️

I can't pass up an opportunity to rave about Mike Barbarette. From day one, he was 'on top of things. He always communicated very quickly. He is very knowledgeable, personable, and honest, with great integrity. Mr. Barbarette operated, taking great care, swiftly, as if I were a family member - this is how I felt, anyway. I am extremely impressed with his dedication, integrity, knowledge, and perseverance - truly, the list goes on!! Then, Mike handled a situation, unrelated to the purpose for which he was hired, that arose unexpectedly, "as a courtesy". I mean, who does that? In addition, I contacted him, wanting to hire him (willing to pay whatever it took) to handle a task for me. Instead, he told me exactly what I could do and how to do it. He actually took the time to call me back after I left a message with my request. Mr. Barbarette went above and beyond - I am overwhelmed with gratitude because of his demonstration of compassion, skill, fast and effective communication, and an overall 'aggressiveness approach' in making things happen, fast! Thank you Mike and team!!! I will be forever grateful 😊

Outstanding Legal Expertise and Client Care!

I had the pleasure of working with Kevin Quirk on a complex legal traffic matter, and I couldn’t be more satisfied with the results. From the very beginning, he demonstrated a deep understanding of the law and provided clear, concise advice that was easy to understand. Kevin is not only extremely knowledgeable but also honest, empathetic, and truly invested in his clients’ well-being.

Thanks to Kevin’s hard work and great advice, my case was completely resolved, and I couldn’t be happier with the result. I highly recommend him to anyone in need of legal representation.

If you’re looking for an attorney who combines expertise with a personal touch, look no further than the Law Office of Barbarette & Quirk!

Kevin Quirk is by far the BEST attorney in Gainesville. He has been helped me with several charges. Many of which he got sealed, dropped, and reduced for me. It’s obvious he has a great relationship with the Gainesville court. Years later, he has still been a phone call away from giving me advice on my future endeavors. When you speak to him, it’s almost as if you’ve known him for decades. He’s kind, trustworthy, and looks after you!

Kevin, from the bottom of my heart, THANK YOU!

Kevin Quirk absolutely the best of the best hands down !! Mr quirk is not only very honest to his profession but also very upfront and transparent by explaining the process step by step he does not keep us guessing , always answers his calls and if he doesn't have an answer he will find one. i would highly recommend Kevin Quirk and his team for the hard work they do to keep their client's bests interest in mind. if you are some one who is in desperate  need of a honest counsel during your testing times you can count on Barbarette & Quirk law office  Kevin was truly a life saver for me !!.
Kevin really helped me out here! Terrific service and results. Would go directly to them right away if you need representation 🙏🏻

Kevin Quirk was attentive, resourceful, and thorough in handling my traffic citation inquiry. He was informative and responsive throughout the process, and I was pleased with the outcome of my case. I would definitely recommend this practice to anyone going through legal challenges.
Had an accident and I felt overwhelmed I called mike Barbarette and he took the case and made us feel confident and was able to make the whole thing just go away thanks mike👍
Customer service
Mike is a very aggressive attorney.  He handled my case quickly.   Dropped before the first court date.  These guys are a blessing.

I have known Mr. Barbarette for about 20 years all on a professional basis. I have dealt with quite a few attorneys in my past in all different aspects and I can say unequivocally that Mike is without a doubt one of the most professional, caring, and absolutely most efficient attorneys I have ever dealt with. He really listens and pays attention to the details that most others would overlook just because they've gotten complacent with their job. I can say without a doubt that there is no way you will regret hiring this firm.
Completely amazing...Always answers and if not always calls back always remembers everyone’s name...& NEVER too busy!😇💯

I have known Kevin for over 20 years, my family and I have relied upon him sadly more times than attorney/client interaction need happen. Nonethless, he is a good man with not only an astute knowledge of the circuit 8 system but exceptionally well-versed in statutes and ethically represents his clients. I pray life treats you well enough that the unforseen do not force you in to a legal corner but if it does He and Mike Barbarette are well-equipped so you don't have to go it alone or with inadequate Florida appointed representation. Ethical, moral and a good person with a degree from William & Mary (yes, where Thomas Jefferson went) who represents 'we the people'. Don't take it from me, call his office if you or a loved one are in need and expect results of the highest caliber. Do take this from me, he has been practicing in circuit 8 for quite sometime and his rapport with judges is quite unique. He will not lead you on and puff his chest out to make false promises; he silently and skillfully (a real tacticion) gathers data, pushes onward towards resolve and surgically manuevers the state into favorable and desirable agreements. I am yet to take any case to trial under his guidance and never felt anything was left on the table as a result. Trials are a lot more money, money and time that Kevin allowed me to keep!!
Keven has represented me as well as multiple family members and has exceeded expectations every time

Mike Barbarette is a great lawyer! He is very upfront with you about your circumstances and will answer all your questions. You will feel rest assured with his representation as he is very on top of everything and keeps you informed along the way.

In the end I managed to get great results on my case so I am very happy I contacted his office. I would definitely recommend him to my friends and family. If you're looking for legal representation don't hesitate to give them a call!!
Good attorney's they resolved my problem.
Had serious charges and was able to get me a great deal from the state .....considering my charges.

If you have been searching online for a lawyer, stop here & call their office now!

Wow! Best experience with a lawyers office ever! I live out of state so I called several offices but wasn't pleased so I kept calling around. One office who couldn't help with traffic court recommended BQ - Mr. Mike answered the first time & stayed on the phone with me for about 15 min explaining everything to me in detail - he was very honest & gave me different options .I called him Monday afternoon about a court date scheduled for that Wednesday - I honestly thought he was going to turn down my case since it was only for a traffic ticket, but I was so grateful he was able to help on such a super short notice.  Thank you Mike!

Attorney Mr. Quirk and his assistant Mrs Jan answered my questions on  my traffic case before taking any money. When I gave them money all the way til the end. They treated my case with diligence and calculation. He was upfront with me on possible outcomes.  Attorneys just don't contact you once they get the money; I have been there with everything from criminal defense attorneys to DUI lawyers. Mr. Kevin Quirk did and if I emailed Mr, Quirk or his assistant with a question for him he personally responded.  He personally called me and notified me of my case outcome. His assistant answered any and all of my questions and gave me the comfort and reassurance that I was being taken care of at all times. You just don't find this type of dedication to your rights being protected and to customer service anymore in this fast pace world. These people are great and I would recommend them to anyone facing issues that their office may handle. I would like to extend my gratuity for the competence, care, and honesty extended to me by this carefully assembled defense team, Sincerely Carlos E.

I stumbled on this law firm after doing a quick search on google for criminal attorneys and I am so glad I did. After talking to attorney Kevin Quirk for a few short minutes over the phone, I knew in my gut that he was the guy that was going to get it done. He’s a UF graduate with over 20 years in practice which was also another huge plus for me. To make a long story short, my criminal case was ultimately dismissed. Although everyone’s case is completely different, I would definitely without a doubt recommend Kevin Quirk if you find yourself in a serious situation. Don’t Think Twice.

I was charged with Driving with a suspended license and registration with knowledge. He was the third lawyer I called that day and not only was he very engaging but he charged the lowest and struck a deal with the prosecutor to drop all the charges. I was so relieved.
Eric is very honest and explains things with much understanding. Thank you.
Mr Ruff called me back after hours ( 6:30 on Friday ) and spent his time to help me with my situation.  You don’t see that anymore.  Thank you Mr Ruff.

Eric and Linda are so fantastic.  They made a very difficult decision and experience as comfortable as it could be.

10/10

Eric was absolutely amazing throughout my Chapter 7 case. From the very first consultation, he made me feel comfortable and never judged my situation. He walked me step-by-step through the process and made sure I knew exactly what to expect at my 341 meeting. Anytime I had a question, he responded quickly and thoroughly. I’m so grateful for his guidance during such a stressful time. Highly recommend!

I cannot say enough great things about attorney Eric Ruff. From the very first conversation, he made me feel completely comfortable and at ease. He is incredibly professional, yet so warm and approachable that speaking with him feels less like talking to a lawyer and more like talking to a trusted father figure who genuinely cares about your well-being.

Eric has an exceptional way of explaining the law in a clear, educational, and reassuring manner. He doesn’t rush you, he doesn’t talk over you, and he makes sure you truly understand every step of the process. His knowledge of the law is outstanding — he knows it like the back of his hand — and that confidence immediately puts you at ease during what can otherwise be a stressful situation.

What really sets him apart is how much he cares. You can tell he takes pride in his work and in helping people, not just handling cases. I walked away feeling informed, supported, and confident in my decisions.

I highly recommend Eric Ruff to anyone looking for an attorney who is not only extremely knowledgeable and professional, but also compassionate, patient, and genuinely invested in his clients.

Mr. Ruff was very thorough with the step-by-step process for my case. Great sense of humor, and he was very informative of things I needed to know proceeding with my case. Thank you for your time and effort!

I highly recommend Atty Eric Ruff! He is amazing and very helpful! I made my consultation with him and from that first conversation with him I already know that he is the best Lawyer to represent me for my bankruptcy case! He is very resourceful, knowledgeable and will give you all the best advice you can get from a consultation. He is not just an attorney but will also give you an advice as a friend. I would like to Thank you Attorney Eric Ruff! Without your help and effort, i wouldnt be able to discharge my debt and have a peace of mind to start my life over. I have learned alot from you! Your sense of humor is a bonus!! Thank you so much to you and Ms Linda for all your hardwork!

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

The fact is Mr. Ruff deeply cares about the profession of law, but he cares about his client's vested interest even more. Bankruptcy law is static. It doesn't change. But what really counts, is the attorney that you choose to represent you. If you're looking for a championed empathetic professional, look no further. Bankruptcy can be an overwhelming process to navigate by yourself; however, with Mr. Ruff, he tirelessly works with you to understand the process and navigate through it extremely efficiently. Mr. Ruff has a sharp eye to detail dealing with a highly complex legal process, has a keen sense of humor, and knows this area of law to the nth degree. If I knowingly had to enter the process again, I would highly recommend Mr. Eric Ruff, without hesitation or any reservation. He will work with you in a manner that is cordial, prompt, and tireless. He will answer your call in the evening as late as necessary (even on a weekend), and he will stay with you while you meet and thoroughly and patiently answer any and all questions or concerns. He knows you're already in a stretched situation, and is very open and honest about what he thinks you should invest in legally and will only recommend exactly what is necessary. He is not looking to bill you for extraneous services nor by each second you spend with him. Put very simply he cares about you, and I can certainly say you will be left in the best of hands.
Mr. Ruff was very helpful in my financial situation. Very smart and to the point. His expertise put me on the right track for my future.

I had the pleasure of receiving a phone call back the same day about a very concerning situation.  "I recently had a consultation with Mr. Ruff about a legal dispute that was concerning to me.   From the start, I was impressed by his professionalism, attention to detail, and ability to explain complex legal concepts in a way that was easy for me to understand. Mr. Eric Ruff listened carefully to my concerns, asked thoughtful questions, and provided clear, practical advice that gave me confidence in the direction I should take.

they was helpful
Mr Galigani assisted me with a family issue and provided me the best guidance. I’m forever indebted to him and will never hesitate to recommend him. Look no further....

We were so extremely lucky to have found Michael Hines and the Galigani Law Firm. The Galigani Law Firm was in the top Google search results for Bradford County criminal cases, as we had no idea where to even start when we found ourselves in need of a criminal defense lawyer. From the very first phone call, Michael Hine's team showed genuine empathy for our situation and immediately made us feel we made the right decision calling them.

Upon getting the case started, Michael went above and beyond to answer all of our questions, and I mean ALL. And most importantly, the great customer service continued once we paid the retainer AND even after the case had closed. Michael followed up with us directly even we he didn't need to!

Beyond making the process feel so much less stressful, Michael Hines and his team delivered positive results for us within a matter of days. We honestly didn't have any idea what to expect, and Michael seemed to work magic for us. We greatly appreciated that Michael and his team never overpromised. They were very thorough in explaining all possible outcomes. We felt prepared for every scenario. And when the time came, Michael delivered a better outcome than we ever anticipated.

Michael Hines helped our family out of a seemingly impossible situation which was recurring in cycles due to "the system" in which we know so many other families in Florida find themselves. We also felt the fee involved for the service was reasonable, and we would've paid so much more had we known how quickly Michael would have our situation 100% resolved.

We are forever grateful for the service provided by Michael Hines and his team. And to the lovely staff of the Galigani Law Firm, they were an absolute breath of fresh air in the start of a otherwise very bad day (Jill especially!). Thank you!

Michael Hines at Galigani Law Firm was a fantastic lawyer throughout my process. In early consultation he was very clear with his intentions and laid out every possible scenario. If you are in need of a lawyer I highly recommend Galigani Law Firm. I was facing a misdemeanor as a first time offender and the case was quickly dismissed thanks to Michael Hines. Professional, efficient, and all around excellent service.
Professional, to the point, helped me every bit of the way, and stayed transparent. I couldn't ask for anything more. Highly recommend.

If your in need of an attorney don't hesitate to hire Michael Hines to represent you. Was represented by Attorney Michael B. Hines for 3 pending cases and had them all dismissed. Great experience and very good at keeping in contact. Would recommend to anyone in need of an efficient attorney that will get the job done right.

I initially chose Micheal because, honestly, his services were the cheapest of all the lawyers I had contacted. Also he was one of the few who actually answered promptly.
