I cannot recommend Mr. Silverman highly enough. After working with two other attorneys before him, I can say with complete confidence that he is in a league of his own. His knowledge of the law and court procedures is exceptional, and he consistently demonstrates a level of professionalism and clarity that is rare to find.

What truly sets Mr. Silverman apart is his honesty and his willingness to answer every question thoroughly. He is upfront, realistic, and never sugarcoats anything—but he also fights for his clients with everything he’s got. You always know exactly where you stand, exactly what to expect, and exactly what the best strategy is moving forward.

His assistant, Destiny, is also outstanding—responsive, organized, and always willing to help. Together they make an incredible team.

After my experience with other lawyers, I wouldn’t trust anyone else with my legal matters. Mr. Silverman will be my first choice every time for any and all legal needs. An exceptional attorney and an even better advocate.

“An Unbeatable Legal Team”
“My divorce lasted four years, and throughout that time Stephanie Mack and Josh Silverman provided steady, professional, and highly effective representation. Stephanie is strategic, and deeply knowledgeable about the courts and judges, while Josh is sharp, commanding, and masterful with the law and in the courtroom. Together they are an exceptional team, and I recommend them without hesitation.

I was fortunate enough to have Josh Silverman represent me as my legal attorney recently. Through the entirety of my case he was there giving me advice, answering any and all questions I had, and giving me regular updates about my case. When I was given an unjust and unfair ruling in my case, Josh immediately worked on an appeal that successfully got the ruling overturned within the same week. I highly and sincerely recommend Josh Silverman if you are looking for the best of the best to represent you.

I went to Josh Silverman after a recommendation from a family member. I had what I considered to be a unique need with unique circumstances. I wanted a highly skilled attorney that had fire and tenacity and that's exactly what I got. From the very beginning he attacked my case and never let up. He guided me to a desired resolution and for that I am eternally grateful. I hope I never need Mr Silverman's services again but if I find myself in need, he is worth his weight in gold.

My husband and I were in need of a highly skilled, tactical, knowledgeable and diligent attorney. Josh's skill, knowledge and diligence ultimately got our case settled. In fact, it assisted in finally getting to implement proper adherence to my husband's current court orders pertaining to his son. Though the case drug on for almost 2 years, (at no fault to Josh). Josh's stamina, endurance and assertiveness never waivered. He is a straight shooter and knows the laws and statutes inside and out. This is reflected in his ability to interpret and discern legal terminology and ensure that his presentation sets a precedence that brings a confidence to a court room that dominates. Our case has been settled for a while now, but unfortunately we have needed his advice again and as before Josh was more than willing to jump into the task and provide us with the tools and weapons necessary in order to navigate the relentless attempt of others to violate my husband's rights. We have recommended Josh to other family, friends and co-workers who are in need of a highly skilled attorney and will continue to.

I retained Josh Silverman based on his reputation and was not disappointed. His abilities throughout my divorce process were everything i hoped for. I would recommend his services to anyone trying to navigate a divorce.

Joshua Silverman was very helpful in getting me divorced and making sure I wasn't taken advantage of. I'm not an easy man to make happy but I walked away from my divorce yesterday and been smiling ever since.

Navigating a divorce is never easy, but working with Stephanie Mack made an incredibly tough process more manageable. Before hiring any divorce attorney, it’s important to go in with reasonable expectations, which is something I learned along the way. One key takeaway: trust your attorney. Don’t overcommunicate. Your attorney has other clients, and what feels like a crisis (a level 8 or 9 to you) might be more like a 4 from their legal perspective. That’s not a bad thing-it means they know how to keep things in perspective. Being organized and clear with your communication helps everything go more smoothly and keeps your bill from ballooning unnecessarily.

Stephanie and her team at Silverman and Mack  are genuinely good people. I’m grateful for their guidance and steady support through a difficult divorce. Stephanie proved herself time and time again, not just in how she handled the case strategically, but in how much she cared. She worked late into the night and early the next morning to help reach a settlement with a challenging ex before court, showing that she really had my back when it counted most.

She’s honest and upfront in all areas, which isn’t always easy to hear in the moment, but looking back, I appreciated her directness and clarity every step of the way. I also found her fees to be very fair and reasonable. She’s not the kind of attorney who’s going to nickel-and-dime you.

If you want someone who will be honest, work hard, and truly be in your corner, I’d highly recommend Stephanie Mack.

I retained Josh Silverman and his team to help me through a divorce. Josh was professional and understanding at all times. He listened, he understood what was at risk and he got it done!

Through the divorce trial Josh made sure that everything was reasonable and fair not only for me but the child I had in common with my ex.

If you’re looking for a divorce lawyer, there isn’t one better!

I hired Joshua Silverman for my divorce case last April and paid around $6,500 upfront, expecting competent legal representation. Instead, I received absolutely nothing in return. I am a single mom on a teacher’s salary, and this was a huge financial sacrifice for me.

I felt I had everything on my end (financials, parenting course, papers signed) done within two weeks of hiring him, yet he never even got the papers served to the defendant. He ignored my calls and emails, rarely provided updates, and did nothing to move my case forward. Eventually, the court filed a motion to drop the case I believe due to his inaction.

After months of being ignored and left in limbo, I had no choice but to file a complaint with the state bar. No client should ever have to go through this level of negligence and dishonesty. If you’re looking for a lawyer who will actually work on your case and respect your time and money, look elsewhere. This experience has been a complete nightmare, and I wouldn’t wish this level of stress on anyone.

As of yesterday, I was refunded the unused portion of my money after calling almost daily for 2 months. Still not divorced.

Save yourself the frustration.

Extremely happy with the outcome of my situation. Josh was very good about communicating the details of each step in the process and made sure to let me know what to expect throughout it. I highly recommend Josh as representation for anyone needing guidance in their own situation. Couldn’t be more grateful to have chosen him as my lawyer.

Hire Joshua Silverman.
YOU WILL NOT BE OUTLAWYERED.
He represented me in a high-conflict custody battle that began in 2018- 2 cases (same child), multiple judges, thousands of dollars, and 2 attorneys later- I hired Joshua Silverman and in Oct of 2024, I walked out of the courtroom with a smile on my face and 50/50 custody of my child.
He is very assertive, which is what I love most about him and I felt safely represented sitting next to him in that courtroom (which was gonna be a witchtrial against me).
He knows the Law. Better than most.
We didnt even have the trial that day bc he outlawyered the other attorney before we even began. The hearing was scheduled for 9-5. And we were out by Noon.
He exudes confidence, especially in the courtroom and you will not feel more comfortable or better represented by any other attorney.
Hire Joshua Silverman. :)

Don’t hire Silverman. He came highly recommended. I paid a retainer last year for him to do a couple things for my case. He was supposed to 1. File a motion with request for rehearing and based on if the Judge said “no” the next step (based on a conversation with him at hiring phase 2. File an appeal.  This began in March 2023. It is now March 2024, and I still have never received (multiple phone calls and emails were not returned) no status update on that motion being filed. I had to find out myself through the court that the Judge had not granted Silverman’s request. (Silverman still has not told me this update.) And now it is too late (1 year has passed) to file the appeal Silverman should have filed. By the way there’s over $1,000 of retainer left unused according to his office at the time of this review— so there’s no excuse for this kind of negligence. So if you still decide to hire him: 1. Get it in writing what he will do for your case 2. Get ready to make a part-time hobby out of hunting this guy down with phone calls, emails, etc. 3. Get in writing that he will give you status updates on your case- within 7 days of a court filing- specifically court decisions- and 4. Get in writing that he will take prompt action meeting court deadlines for filings. I now am filing a complaint with The FL Bar. What happened in my case can now no longer be undone because he chose not to give me an update, and more importantly, he failed to follow through on what I hied him to do. But by the way- the office can’t find any contract in my file stating what I hired him to do. So get it in writing. One more thing: the motion he wrote was sent to me as a draft last year and seemed to have errors (mentioning the petitioner (me) not showing up for court) - this was never true. I asked him about this confusing statement in the motion since I always showed up for court- and guess what? No response to that email. Major red flags.

Josh Silverman, and Brent were outstanding throughout my arduous divorce process. Prior to hiring Silverman and Mack, I was being charged with outlandish fees from another firm. Silverman and Mack not only provided more than fair billing practices, but substantially better representation. Silverman and Mack will always be my first choice for any future needs in regard to legal representation.
I am grateful to have had Josh as my attorney. His guidance was invaluable in navigating my divorce. I would highly recommend him to anyone needing legal counsel.

When you hire Josh Silverman as your attorney, you are hiring one of the best attorneys in Gainesville. Rest assured that everything will be taken care of. He knows to deal with tough stuff and doesn’t back down. His paralegal Brent is also phenomenal. He helped me through some really tough situations. They made time for me and my concerns. They made me feel that my case was very important to them and were extremely supportive. They abated my fears and lessened my stressors. I highly recommend them.

​I recently went through a divorce after a 44-year marriage, and the experience was incredibly challenging and emotionally draining. However, I am grateful to have found Stephanie Mack's law office during this difficult time. From the moment I walked in, Donna, Stephanie Mack's secretary, greeted me warmly with a smile that instantly lifted my spirits. Her words of encouragement were exactly what I needed in my fragile state. Additionally, Rachel, Stephanie Mack's assistant, was kind-hearted and spoke softly, creating a comforting atmosphere.

As my meetings with Stephanie Mack progressed, it became evident that she had been attentively observing and analyzing both me and my case in ways I had never experienced before. Her dedication and thorough understanding of my situation produced remarkable results. Stephanie's expertise in family law and her compassionate approach gave me a sense of comfort and security throughout the entire process. She guided me with wisdom and clarity, ensuring that my interests were protected every step of the way.

I am immensely grateful to Stephanie Mack and her incredible team for their exceptional support during this challenging time. Their professionalism, expertise, and genuine care have made a significant difference in my divorce proceedings. If you are seeking a divorce attorney who truly understands the complexities of the process and provides unwavering support, I highly recommend Stephanie Mack's law office.

Stephanie Mack really goes the extra mile for her clients. She is an attorney that is extremely professional, engaging, knowledgeable, and quick to respond, I highly recommend. She is clearly passionate about the law. I recommend to all my family and friends. Thanks for all your help and professionalism.

I would give 10 stars, if I were able to. Stephanie Mack is absolutely AMAZING!  She went WAY above and beyond for me!  My divorce was (and continues to be) a high conflict situation.  Stephanie did (and continues to do) everything right!  She is professional, super experienced, has been in the Gainesville area for decades and therefore has strong contacts and connections.  She kept my fees down as much as possible and would take the time to check on me to make sure I was okay.  She GENUINELY cares about her clients and how she can help them.  I wouldn't be surprised if she also has a degree in psychology!  LOL!  She is excellent at reading a situation, reading the people involved, understanding the opposing counsel, and determining the best route for your case.  Her experience and intelligence give her that extra edge that you need for your case.  She will walk you through options tailored to your situation and the people involved, while keeping your budget in mind.  She is certainly NOT one of those lawyers who will drag things out just to bleed you for more money.  I would HIGHLY recommend her and have recommended her to others I know going through similar situations.  She is simply fantastic at what she does and a wonderful human being altogether!  Thank you, Stephanie, for all that you have done for me and continue to do for me!  You are AMAZING!  I genuinely do not know where my life would be right now if it wasn't for you!

Going through a divorce in any circumstance is difficult and heartbreaking. My divorce was especially sensitive and messy, and that can make the legal process both daunting and worrisome. Josh Silverman is the absolute best lawyer I have ever worked with. From the very first meeting I felt heard, understood, and actions to start the divorce process began immediately. It felt like my kids and myself mattered to him. He was patient and through as he helped me to navigate my concerns and questions through the process. Josh was always one step ahead of the situation and due to his expertise he was able to deliver the outcome I had been hoping for. I would highly recommend Silverman and Mack of Gainesville for any family law representation you need.

I recently had the “privilege” of being represented by Mr. Silverman in a contested, and contentious divorce. He was prompt, thorough, knowledgeable, and well prepared. The outcome was as good as could be expected, I couldn’t have asked for better results. Aside from logistics, he was supportive and responsive to all of my questions and concerns throughout. Given the opportunity, I would never hesitate to recommend Mr. Silverman and his wonderful staff to someone in need of a Divorce attorney.

Used this firm previously for my divorce - I went back as I was having issues with my agreement and required assistance. I spoke to Stephanie Mack on the phone and emailed her as well. Once she spoke to me she said she would get everything drafted. I never heard back after that. I followed up several times with phone calls and emails and would even use my colleague's phone as my phone calls were being screened and they would only pick up when I called from her number. Extremely disappointing and frustrating during an already difficult time.

I did not have a good experience. I called and scheduled a paid consultation with the firm. I met with Ms. Mack and she reviewed my case. She asked that I complete a few things and call her back. She said she was also going to do some research on her end. After completing those things I called a few weeks later and an appointment was set for me to speak to Ms. Mack on the phone. I let her know I completed what she requested and she reviewed my case again and said she would call me back after she looked into some things. I waited a few weeks and never heard back so I called again. I was told by the woman that answered the phone that Ms. Mack had been busy. I told her this had been dragging out for weeks and I just wanted to know if Ms. Mack would take my case or not. She said she would have her call me back. It's been over a week and I still haven't heard anything. I'm disappointed in the run around I have gotten and at this point am looking for representation elsewhere.
Best lawyer in Gainesville.

They make youvdrive one hr and then they say oh I am sorry can't take ur case.
I would not recommend this place to no one. Very rude people
reviews.authorName: I Can and I Will “Alhumdolila” In Sha Allah

reviews.text: Stephanie will take the time to listen to you and provide support and reassurance. As a more anxious person, this was incredibly helpful. She is honest and doesn't promise anything but instead tries to give realistic answers. I've unfortunately had to go through a few lawyers over the years, and Stephanie has by far been the best.

Stephanie Mack is amazing! She took over a case for my husband after his previous attorney just took the money and ran! She was always very responsive, very professional and honest at all times. She took over this case with very little time and went above and beyond! Highly recommended! Thank you again

When hiring an attorney it is difficult to know the difference between a top-tier attorney and a lower-tier attorney.  However, the difference is profound.  It was astounding to watch an attorney who seemingly lives and breathes the law litigate in court against an attorney who simply couldn't keep up.   Our community is truly fortunate to be served by such a highly skilled attorney as Josh Silverman'.

Josh Silverman’s knowledge of the law is unmatched. All through my divorce modification he provided expert guidance and compassionate representation. You will find no finer divorce lawyer in this state.
Great divorce attorney, keeping tabs on a lot for me

I wanted to write about my positive experience using Silverman, Mack & Associates for a difficult divorce case for my father. I called almost every law firm in the Gainesville area and was met with lots of subpar responses.. some wanted monetary deposits right away, some never called me back and others after hearing the situation told me it was a lost cause. I was then referred to Josh Silverman by a coworker. I called and explained the situation and was met right off the bat with a plan on how to help us! Josh and his paralegal, Brent worked diligently. The case lasted from October 2020 to approximately May 2021. Although we hit many bumps in the road, showed frustration and lost a bit of hope, Josh and Brent NEVER let us feel as if this case was a waste of time. My father still talks about how Josh stood up for him and said something along the lines of, “I’d rather turn in my lawyer card and stop practicing, than let my client accept this deal.” Not only was Josh stern and straight to the point during court sessions – he was hilarious and caring during our Zoom meetings. He knew how to crack jokes and definitely cared about our wellbeing and mental health. I also have to give a shout out to Brent, I won’t forget that moment over the phone where we finally found what we needed after he spent hours staring at a screen sifting through documents. My goal was to find a team who could get the job done, and I got just that!  They handled our case with the upmost professionalism and also made us feel like we were friends. I also believe for the work they did, their pricing is extremely reasonable!

Thank you Josh and Brent!

I used Mr. Silverman during my divorce and he clearly had my best interests in mind.  He did not rush me to make decisions and took time to explain how the process works every step of the way.  I would recommend this firm for all of your legal needs.
These attorney's are amazing.  I recommend them if your ever in need of a family law attorney.. you can't go wrong with them..
The team at Silverman, Mack, and Associates did a fantastic job with my case.  They were responsive, knowledgeable, and prepared.  I will be recommending them in the future.

Mr. Silverman has been my attorney since 2012. It’s very difficult knowing whether you have chosen the correct attorney, especially in family law, until they are in front of a judge litigating on your behalf. I can assure you that Mr. Silverman is the best choice in the area.  I have friends in similar situations that wish they had chosen Mr. Silverman after I tell them how he has handled my case. If you have questions, he answers then promptly. He passionately fights on your behalf, and you will not be disappointed if you allow him to fight for you as well.

I never thought I would need an attorney but when I did I was so grateful I found Josh Silverman and his staff. They guided me through a very difficult time not only with skill, knowledge and professionalism but sincere caring and attention to my well being throughout the process. A special thank you to Brent Lanier for always being available and of course Josh for fighting for me when I was unable to do so for myself. You guys are the best.

Stephanie Mack represented me through my recent divorce. She was FANTASTIC! Stephanie was extremely helpful and professional throughout the entire process. Silverman was the absolutely the worse attorney ever! Biggest waste of time and money. Didn’t show up for planned meetings after I shifted my day around to meet him. I was very happy with the service that Stephanie Mack provided for me. She was always responsive and helpful. We highly recommend Mr. Silverman as an attorney and will turn to him in the future if needed.
Professional staff but needs to improve on contacting back when requested.

**Exceptional Care and Results – Highly Recommend Fine, Farkash & Parlapiano!**

After my mother suffered a painful and stressful slip and fall inside a major grocery store, we reached out to several law firms, only to be met with false promises and fading hopes. Thankfully, we found Fine, Farkash & Parlapiano, and it was the best decision we could have made.

From the moment my mother connected with Gabrielle Jenkins, everything changed. The attorneys at this firm treated my mother like family, guiding her through every step of the process with genuine care and unwavering support. They didn’t just promise results – they delivered, securing an excellent settlement that brought peace and justice to our family.

Their commitment to excellence goes beyond just talk. It’s felt in every conversation, every update, and every compassionate moment they share with their clients. This firm isn’t just about business – it’s about people, and they proved that to us time and again.

Fine, Farkash & Parlapiano is a true home for those in need of strong, sincere legal representation, and I wholeheartedly recommend them to anyone looking for a firm with unmatched character and dedication.

Thank you for being a beacon of hope during a challenging time.

Sometimes in life and in business, excitement and optimism can get the best of us. For it can stand in the way of our clear sighted vision.

I was on the verge of entering into a partnership, which very well could’ve adversely altered the course I was on as I advance towards my financial objectives and goals.

Attorney Gonzalo made a few practical suggestions, reflecting experience and insight, and encouraged me to dig a little deeper.

By means of the due diligence I conducted, based off her suggestions, it helped me to see that the proposed partnership was most certainly the wrong move for me to make.

Nouvelle very well may be an Angel, as she provided me with a high level of protection, which is the mark of any good Attorney or representative.

I have spoken with other members on Attorney Gonzalo’s team, and they all reflect professionalism, executing a high level of Client Service, something which this world has unfortunately sacrificed to maximize profitability. So many businesses today completely miss the point that providing a complete, detailed, personal, non-generic professional experience is the key to Client retention.

Attorney Gonzalo’s team is great! Without a doubt, “Attitude reflects leadership!”

As I kick off my season with Gonzalo Law, I look forward to building with Nouvelle, an advisor that I undoubtedly feel confident, that I can win The Championship with!

Adam’s priorities are more focused on the client(s)’ experience throughout the legal process; and he will go above and beyond to make sure everything is done with the utmost professionalism while maintaining a great relationship with his clients. reviews.text: My wife and I went to Adam to draw up new wills for each of us as well as Durable Power of Attorney, Living Will, and Health Surrogate documents in February & March of 2018. Our old wills, while serviceable, needed total revision and Adam accomplished this very well. We had a long meeting to discuss the various provisions, which he explained very fully and competently.  Wills are crucial legal documents that must be prepared for any eventuality--even if one thinks that these may be remote. And his documents, I must say, envisioned all such possible problems. I should add he has a simple office, with no bustling receptionists, legions of paralegals, and sumptuous meeting rooms.  It's a basic operation, and he therefore charges very reasonable rates (half of what I paid some 5 years ago elsewhere) since there is minimum overhead.  He is also very personable and friendly. I recommend him very highly.

reviews.text:
My mother and I sought out Eric's legal guidance following a disappointing experience with our initial law firm. The first firm we engaged with left us in the dark, failing to initiate any meaningful communication and dragging out our case until the statute of limitations was close to expiring.

Finding a lawyer willing to take on our case after so many years had passed, especially one licensed in both Florida and California, proved to be a daunting task. Fortunately, a Google search led us to Eric, who graciously responded, setting clear expectations from the outset.

Eric's accessibility and willingness to dedicate time to explaining legal matters, particularly since I was assisting my mother, were truly appreciated. The intimate size of his office allowed us to interact directly with him, fostering an environment of open communication. Ethical, reliable, and compassionate, Eric embodies the qualities one would hope for in an attorney. Given the unpromising nature of our case due to the delayed of time, Eric fought his best to secure the best possible outcome from the adjuster.

In stark contrast to our first law firm, working with Eric was a refreshing change of pace. His unwavering integrity throughout our legal journey was a reassuring testament to his professionalism. We're grateful to have had the opportunity to work him.

reviews.text: I have had a great experience and made wonderful progress in the care of Dr. Leone. I'm a 39 year old commercial and residential cleaner and active mom. Initially my girl was experiencing dizziness and headaches, I was plagued with headaches, and all 3 of us were feeling soreness in similar ways, which we got noticeable relief from as we went for adjustments and followed her instructions for exercises.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Kelly, We appreciate your review! Hopefully it well help other moms who have children in the car with them in an auto accident find us easily. Many primary care and pediatrician doctors will not accept car insurance and because our office does, many moms choose us to check their babies and kids after a crash. Further, no referral is required to use the car insurance, which is always the primary insurance for a car related injury.


Whiplash injuries to the neck and back often come after a car accident and include headache and dizziness just to name a few symptoms. When the root of the problem is addressed, which is the blocked nerve supply from the neck to the head, those headaches and dizziness get better! We are so glad you chose us instead of just masking symptoms with medications which often times just prolongs the problems because the underlying spinal problems don't get fixed!

reviews.text:
Outstanding Legal Representation & Stress-Free Resolution!
Back in December 2024, I received a non-criminal traffic infraction while passing through Gainesville, Florida. I immediately contacted LegalShield, and they referred me to the law firm of Attorney Christian A. Straile. I reached out on January 2nd, left a message, and was promptly called and emailed back the same day with clear and specific instructions on how to proceed.
I quickly provided all requested documentation, and while the email mentioned the hearing could occur anywhere between two weeks to three months, I remained patient. To my absolute delight, by February 7th, I received a spectacular letter—CASE DISMISSED!
This result far exceeded my expectations. I didn’t have to appear in court, there were no extra fees, fines, or points on my license. I’ve never met Attorney Straile in person, but I truly appreciate how he runs his practice—with professionalism, prompt communication, and proven results.
Every representative I interacted with was knowledgeable, courteous, and thorough. It was a pleasure working with this firm, and I wholeheartedly recommend Full Focus Law and Managing Attorney Christian A. Straile, Esq. to anyone in need of excellent legal services. He’s definitely got my vote!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you! We will pass along your praises to the team.

Mr. Johnson had to be terminated as a client. Then his administrative and criminal matters, NOT handled by the Straile, or any attorney ever associated with Straile, or Full Focus Law, had extremely harsh consequences.

Attorney Straile has represented only one person named Tyrone Johnson as of the typing of this response. Mr. Straile represented the business, and still represents the business owners who were employees or associates at the time that Mr. Johnson was released as a client, on June 12, 2012. This review is thirteen (13) years later and we are at a loss as to why it is one (1) star.

1. We achieved the client’s stated goal in every matter handled by the firm.
2. Mr. Johnson was comfortable enough with the representation to bring a family matter to Mr. Straile’s personal residence after one in the morning (1:00 am). That was passed to a lawyer in the state where the child was located and we are not licensed. Local rules in that jurisdiction required Mr. Johnson to retain a local lawyer, even if Mr. Straile also represented him. We did not handle that matter; another firm in another state did.
3. In a criminal case, Mr. Straile, arrived at the scene of the crime and arrest, and then unfortunately became a good witness for the defense of Mr. Johnson. Straile had to withdraw from the representation. That matter did not end well for Mr. Johnson but was NOT handled by Straile or any attorney ever associated with Straile or the firm.
4. Since Mr. Straile was a witness, he did not represent Mr. Johnson in the administrative proceedings that followed the criminal sentence. The administrative matter did not end well for Mr. Johnson but was NOT handled by Straile or any attorney ever associated with Straile or the firm.
5. We understand that the criminal and subsequent administrative proceedings NOT handled by us, led to extremely harsh collateral consequences. But we were not responsible for those and instead achieved the client’s stated goal in every matter handled by the firm.

reviews.ownerResponse:
You left three one (1) star reviews for law firms at the same time. Your reviews indicate that you are not a client of any one of our firms; you were looking for services. How did another firm have telephone issues at the same time?
At Full Focus Law, telephones are answered 24/7/365. But, not all matters can be addressed immediately or 24/7/365. Calls are answered by staff members. We ask that people schedule appointments and then call at the appointed time. In that manner, we can be available for especially for you and have a more productive meeting.
Please call to schedule an appointment to discuss your concerns.
Since the second other firm earned their one (1) star review by asking to be paid for their work please note that some cases require a consultation fee before we can agree to meet with you.

reviews.ownerResponse:

reviews.ownerResponse:
Edit: The child was removed by court order, before you hired the firm. Having already "lost" the child was a big reason that you hired.

We acknowledge that you sent a picture of a torn envelope.

Ms. Lunsford,
Several lawyers have tried to satisfy your family. You lost the child because the biological mother chose another adoptee. The biological mother gets to choose. I am sorry that she made that choice and delayed the matter, while misleading you and your lawyers in the process.

In the second case, the manner in which the Judge questioned the honesty of your verified pleadings was truly stunning. I have never seen anything like it during my 22 years in courtrooms. I am sure that I sounded surprised. This caused a work stoppage on your matter.

While technology disrupted communication to some of our clients’ invoices, we never charged you fees above the minimum. You did pay costs, such as for an in-person interview with the biological mother inside of a jail in another state and then in trying to find her while she ran from the law across several states upon her release.

On or about March 8, we sent via USPS certified MaiI Number ****0852, your entire case documents and included all the invoices. You claimed that your mail was compromised. But just a day or two before your review, we emailed all the invoices to you, with the final invoice, to the same email we have always used.

We are sorry that the matter did not resolve in the manner your desired.

reviews.ownerResponse: We do charge a consultation fee in Family and Elder law.  Mr. Straile terminated the employee that you interacted with about a year after this review, much for the same conduct that you complained about.  We apologize for your experience with Mr. Straile's former firm, and the employee that was part of the package deal creating that former firm.

reviews.text: I want to take time out to thank you and your office for everything! I don’t know how you did what you did but I can’t thank you enough for it all! I couldn’t afford to get any more points on my license and I thank you so much for fighting for me and winning. Hopefully I will never be in this position again but if I ever find myself or someone I know in another bind I will be sure to use your office again. You guys were great and I appreciate it all.
Hello everybody this is Camilla doing her Google update this attorney just helped me out majorlywanted to tell everybody to give this guy a call
Experienced and Knowledgeable Attorney
Dependable and Efficient.

Karen Yochim represented me in two family law cases.    She was extremely professional and her experience and knowledge  of family law was reassuring during stressful times and provided a positive outcome.     I highly recommend her Law Office.

Karen Yochim is an excellent attorney with an uncanny ability to see the whole of a case all at once, helping her clients make tactical and long term decisions to get to an ultimately successful resolution. I cannot recommend her highly enough.

Got my speeding ticket dismissed :'), 10/10 would recommend. It was my first time hiring an attorney and the process was easy and simple. I asked for assistance through their online portal and they contacted me through email. My case got dismissed after a short while.
Note: they'll contact you when necessary, but as a college student, I thought it was pleasant as I didn't have to worry about the case.

I would Karen 0 stars if I could. When I hired her she couldn’t have been more sweet and personable. She really fooled me!!! she was in reality the exact opposite. I ended up
firing her because she took my money, made promises and did nothing!!! I couldn’t reach her by email or phone, and was always sent to her paralegal, who also didn’t answer by email or phone. I couldn’t get questions answered even about when she would be doing anything for my case. Her response when I walked into her office to get an answer was she has other cases that needed to be worked on. If she couldn’t handle my case she shouldn’t have taken my money. To top it all off, she had an attitude that I had the audacity to walk into her office unannounced (mind you i couldn’t get any answers, or get a hold of her or her paralegal any other way). She then lost her temper and slammed the door in my face and left me and my mother standing in her reception area in absolute shock that a professional could treat their client that way. She is by far the most unprofessional, ineffective and nasty so-called professional I have ever encountered, or hired for that matter. Do yourself a favor and hire absolutely anybody else you can. If you hire Karen she will do nothing, give you the run around, and then lose her temper when you dare ask her when she will be doing what you hired her to do, and that she promised weeks ago.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ms. Karen Yochim is not and never has been associated with Attorney Straile or Full Focus Law.

reviews.text: Has helped me twice with speeding tickets. Office is very prompt in helping your case, and they take care of everything in a timely matter. Its pretty much hands free, I didnt have to show up at court, I just paid the fees over the phone. Inexpensive, prompt, and professional. I would rely on them for all future tickets (but hopefully I get no more in the future haha)

I can’t thank Jackie Long and Christian Straile enough, I got a ticket in November that temporary lost me my job of 3 years. I reached out to them for help and not only did they help me, they got my ticket removed as well as the points. If you ever have a problem with a ticket call and ask for advice first. I was blind to the fact of fighting traffic tickets. I can’t thank these people enough
They are always in communication with you. They are very professional.

I was referred to this firm by a friend after I received a ridiculous ticket that could’ve cost me my job. Their contact was very prompt and I felt like they actually cared about my case. Their rates are reasonable and in the end were able to reduce my disposition to something more appropriate. Even though it wasn’t completely dismissed, they kept me updated every step of the way and I felt they did their very best. I recommend this firm!!

I obtained Tee Lee from this firm and she is absolutely amazing, I couldn't ask for a better person to represent myself in my custody case. She truly cares about her clients and goes above and beyond to make sure that her clients are happy and well informed of what is happening in their case at all times. I would recommend her to anyone that is looking for a hard working honest reliable passionate attorney.

I was gifted Tee Lee as a lawyer when my case with a previous lawyer was going absolutely no where. I was on a strict time limit as I was 8 months pregnant knowing I was about to go on maternity leave when the father of my first born decided he didn't want to pay child support anymore. As you can imagine this was a really stessful time for me. Tee was so quick to get a hearing, which we have won and I was able to relax again. After that my ex husband and I have had many incounters, contempts, etc. I've been working with Tee almost a year and a half, I know I am in great hands! We have won every case. She tells me when I am being fair, level headed or that I may need to reconsider my decision. She has fought for me and my child and will continue till the very end. I love that we have a relationship to where I can put 110% trust into her without evening needing to tell her what I am wanting, she already knows. She is very kind and sweet person. I am so utterly grateful to have met her and hired her. Best lawyer around in my books!
Interesting person with few important law awards
who ever picks up the phone for these people are rude!!! negative
She will say you owe them money but, they got all she getting.
He had me in and out of the court room in less than 15mins with the ticket being thrown out. He is totally AWESOME. He gets ☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆☆ from me !!
I was unsure how the case would turn out when I first signed up with him, but I am quite impressed that he got me off a $400 ticket with no points! I definitely recommend him.

Casey Thompson and the staff were highly professional and took care of all of my needs. I could not have asked for a better attorney. If you are facing family issues, a divorce etc., I give Casey my highest recommendation. He turned a painful situation into a bearable one, and made the process as quick as possible. I am so grateful I found him.
